title: Battery Widget Percentage
excerpt: On the Battery Widget, it defaults to the first slice %, how do you change the % to the slice your want to report on? For example. I have a status field called Accepted Status: with Offered and Accepted. The battery show…

posts.author: jespejo (James Espejo)
posts.cookedHtml: On the Battery Widget, it defaults to the first slice %, how do you change the % to the slice your want to report on? For example. I have a status field called Accepted Status: with Offered and Accepted. The battery shows both, but the % is affixed on Offered, I want to see the % of Accepted as the Widget surface. When I drill into the Widget, I can see select the Accepted and the % changes to that but as soon as I exit drill down, it reverts back to Offered???

posts.author: techguy (Tahara)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi James, there might be a default setting configured for the battery widget to display the % associated with the Offered status slice. You may need to adjust the widget settings to prioritize displaying the % for the accepted status slice instead. Also look for customization options within the widget settings to make this change persist even after exiting the drill-down view.
